welcome.subject: Welcome to {{projectName}}
welcome.html:
Welcome, {{name}}!

Thank you for joining {{projectName}}.

We're excited to have you on board.

verify-email.subject: Verify your email address
verify-email.html:
Verify your email

Please confirm your email address by clicking the link below:

Verify Email

This link will expire in {{expiry}}.
verify-email.text:
Verify your email

Please confirm your email address by clicking the link below:

{{link}}

This link will expire in {{expiry}}.

gdpr-deletion-confirmation.subject: Account Deleted
gdpr-deletion-confirmation.html:
Account Deleted

Your account and personal data have been permanently deleted in accordance with your request.

We're sorry to see you go.
gdpr-deletion-confirmation.text:
Account Deleted

Your account and personal data have been permanently deleted in accordance with your request.

We're sorry to see you go.

account-suspended.subject: Account Suspended
account-suspended.html:
Account Suspended

Your account has been suspended.

Reason: {{reason}}

Date: {{date}}

Please contact support if you believe this is a mistake.

gdpr-export-ready.subject: Your data export is ready
gdpr-export-ready.html:
Your Data Export is Ready

Hello {{name}},

Your requested data export is now available for download.

This link will expire in {{expiryDays}} days.

Download Your Data

For security reasons, this link will expire on {{expiryDate}}.
gdpr-export-ready.text:
Your Data Export is Ready

Hello {{name}},

Your requested data export is now available for download.

This link will expire in {{expiryDays}} days.

Download your data: {{downloadUrl}}

For security reasons, this link will expire on {{expiryDate}}.

gdpr-export-failed.subject: Data export could not be completed
gdpr-export-failed.html:
Data Export Failed

Hello {{name}},

Unfortunately, we were unable to complete your data export request.

Please try again or contact support if the issue persists.
gdpr-export-failed.text:
Data Export Failed
